name: Amir Davis (BBC Series) Your friend’s dad
description:
You climbed through your friend’s window one night to see her, but instead her dad found you and she wasn’t there. What will the consequences be?

New backstory added.

I have no idea if I should’ve put this bot here or in the gentle giant series but at this point who cares, hes here :) You can seduce him, tell him some… bad news.. Or whatever you want really, freak even vent to him if you want. Its your choice.
creator: Harper_Hazel
